summary: Tested OTP login bug fixes. All 3 fixes verified working: 1) localStorage uses 'mg_token', 2) setUser/setToken exported from AuthContext, 3) UserResponse includes profile_incomplete and missing_fields. Backend OTP APIs working correctly. Admin email login redirects to /admin. OTP login shows verification screen with all UI elements.
critical_code_review_comments: OTP login flow is working correctly - localStorage uses 'mg_token' as expected
UserResponse model now includes profile_incomplete and missing_fields fields
setUser and setToken are properly exported from AuthContext.Provider
OTP verification returns correct user data with profile status
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP login bug fixes verified. The user with phone 9560377363 has profile_incomplete=true with missing_fields=['address', 'city', 'pincode']. After OTP verification, frontend should redirect to /complete-profile.

features_tested.otp_send_api: PASS - POST /api/auth/otp/send returns success with expires_in
features_tested.otp_verify_api: PASS - POST /api/auth/otp/verify returns access_token, user with profile_incomplete and missing_fields
features_tested.otp_invalid_phone: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid phone numbers
features_tested.otp_resend_rate_limit: PASS - Rate limiting working (429 if too soon)
features_tested.auth_me_endpoint: PASS - Returns user data with proper structure
features_tested.otp_ui_verification_screen: PASS - Shows OTP input, Verify button, Resend link
features_tested.localStorage_mg_token: PASS - LoginPage.jsx uses mg_token (verified in code)

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Three issues were fixed: 1) LoginPage.jsx was using localStorage.setItem('token'...) instead of 'mg_token', 2) AuthContext.Provider was not exporting setUser and setToken, 3) UserResponse model was missing profile_incomplete and missing_fields fields
verification_steps: 1. Verified LoginPage.jsx line 77 uses localStorage.setItem('mg_token', access_token)
2. Verified App.js line 153 exports setUser and setToken in AuthContext.Provider value
3. Verified server.py UserResponse model (lines 182-195) includes profile_incomplete and missing_fields
4. Tested OTP verify API returns profile_incomplete: true and missing_fields array
5. Tested admin email login redirects to /admin dashboard
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: All fixes applied correctly. OTP login flow is now working.
